A peddler came through swearing they found worked stone and old coin scattered near a collapsed structure
An old map turned up in the archives that marks a cache nobody has found
The foundation crew hit something metal while digging and pulled out a box they could not open
A prospector returned from the ridge with a satchel full of ore she refused to let anyone examine
Someone found an engraved ring in the rubble of the old watchtower and it does not match any local craft
The floods last season washed out a section of bank and exposed what looked like fitted stonework underneath
A traveling scholar offered a small fortune for directions to a ruin that is not on any current map
The well diggers broke through into a hollow space and said they saw the glint of metal before the water rushed in
An old veteran claims he buried his share from a campaign years ago and cannot remember exactly where
A merchant's journal was found in the wall of a demolished building with entries about a hidden storehouse
Miners working the lower tunnels reported finding tool marks that are far older than any settlement in the area
A child found a pendant in the creek bed made of a metal that nobody in the settlement could identify
